top_signals.title: Apollo’s Zelter Sees High-Grade Debt Sales Topping US Treasuries
top_signals.summary: Investment-grade debt sales will outpace net issuance of US Treasuries this year, Apollo Global Management Inc.’s President Jim Zelter said, as the Magnificent Seven tech companies and others seek massive amounts of funding to fuel their expansion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Isabel Schnabel: From money market funds to stablecoins: lessons for central banks
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Buyout and Debt Funds Struggle With $632 Billion Stockpile
top_signals.summary: Private markets firms have been slow to spend hoards of capital raised earlier this decade, sparking tough talks with investors about whether they should get more time to find investments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Nasdaq 100 Futures Drop as Broadcom Forecast Spooks Traders
top_signals.summary: A selloff in technology stocks pushed US stocks lower before the bell on Thursday, as results from Broadcom Inc. forced an unwind in the artificial-intelligence trade that had powered gains over the last several sessions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Blackstone BCRED Joins Private Credit Funds Limiting Redemptions
top_signals.summary: Blackstone Inc. limited redemptions from its flagship private credit fund for the first time after investors sought to pull 10% of the shares, the latest such fund to cap withdrawals amid a continued investor exodus.

top_signals.title: Sugar Futures Climb as Brazilian Mills Seen Making More Ethanol
top_signals.summary: Raw sugar futures in New York advanced for the first time three days on expectations that Brazilian mills may allocate more cane to ethanol production, reducing sugar output during the current crushing season.

top_signals.title: SoftBank-backed PayPay to enter life insurance business
British pensions are about to bankroll the American tech revolution
top_signals.summary: Pension managers owe their members returns, not national loyalty. Any pension manager who ignored potentially transformational businesses purely because they were American would rightly face scrutiny, but commercial logic isn’t the same thing as national advantage.

top_signals.title: Why Amazon has struggled to crack India
top_signals.summary: India, fast-growing and democratic, was supposed to be the ultimate proof that the Amazon model would succeed outside the U.S. and a handful of smaller industrialized countries.
